text: I'm extremely disappointed with how my recent issue was handled. After spending hours trying to reach support and explaining my situation, I feel like nothing was resolved. This is not the level of service I expected. Can someone please address this properly?
I mistakenly requested a refund for an order that I actually want to keep. Please ignore my previous refund request.
Hey, can you tell me if the pro plan is charged monthly or yearly? I need to decide soon.
Hey, I can't log into my account because my username is showing as someone else's. Can you help me get into my account? Also, does this mean my info is safe?
Is there any option for apply student discount? I heard about it but not sure how to.

I can't believe I ordered a headset and got sent the wrong model! It's totally unacceptable and all my friends have been waiting for my review. I expected better service from you guys. Why does this keep happening?
The app crashes every time I try to log in, and sometimes it freezes on the loading screen. I also have a lot of notifications pending that won't clear, which is really annoying!
I'm having a really hard time with the app! It crashes every time I try to open it, and it’s so frustrating. Can someone please help me figure out why this is happening?

I've been trying to log into my account for hours, but I keep getting the wrong password message, even though I'm sure I'm entering it correctly. It's really upsetting because I need access for an important task.
I can't believe I just missed your sale! Do you think there’s any chance I could still get that discount? It feels so unfair that I wasn't able to take advantage of it in time!
I’m seeing that my account got charged again, though I thought I cancelled last month? It’s frustrating, because I still don’t have access to the features I paid for. Can someone explain this?
The app crashes whenever I try to upload a file, and I also noticed the last update was supposed to fix this issue, but it hasn't worked. What should I do?

I am encountering a perplexing issue with my account that I really need assistance with. I recently attempted to change my email address associated with the account, but I am not sure if that was successful. Additionally, I seem to be unable to log in with the new credentials, as I keep receiving an error message that states my password is incorrect. Could you please help me verify if the email change went through, and also assist me in resetting my password? I’m worried that my account may have been compromised, given the complexity of the situation and my concerns about potential unauthorized access.
Hey, I can't seem to log in to my account. I tried resetting my password but the email didn't come through. Also, I think my account was hacked because I saw some strange activity. Can you help?

I've been trying to access the app, but it keeps freezing every time I try to log in. This is really frustrating because I need to use it for my work, and I feel like I've tried everything - restarting my phone, checking my internet connection, and even uninstalling and reinstalling the app multiple times. Can you please help me resolve this? I can't afford to lose more time on this issue.

I was under the impression that my subscription wouldn’t auto-renew since I had canceled it beforehand. However, my account was charged again. I would appreciate it if you could process a refund for this charge and also confirm that the subscription has been successfully canceled like I requested. Thank you for your assistance.
I need my money back immediately! I tried to cancel my subscription, but it keeps renewing without my consent.
I'm really upset because my order never arrived, despite the tracking saying it was delivered. Can I please get a refund or at least have this sorted out? It's very frustrating.

I am writing to formally request a refund for the payment made towards my subscription, which I had previously canceled. It appears that the system has processed an auto-renewal despite my cancellation request. Additionally, I would appreciate confirmation of my account status to ensure that there are no further charges. Thank you.

I can’t believe how disappointing this service has become! I’ve reached out multiple times about my account not being updated, nobody seems to care, and the last representative I spoke to just kept repeating the same scripted responses. It feels like I’m talking to a wall! I even mentioned that I had been a loyal customer for years, and it seems that means nothing now. Why is it so hard to get proper support? I’m really unhappy with this whole situation.
I received the wrong order twice now. this is unacceptable! I was told it would be resolved but nothing has changed.
I heard there's a discount for students, but I can't find the info anywhere. Is it real? Like, do I need to submit something to get it or what?

Could you please clarify the specific eligibility criteria for the educational discount? Additionally, I would like to know how it can be applied effectively during the checkout process, including any necessary documentation required. Thank you.
